ModMetaData.name: Personal Food Preferences
ModMetaData.author: BiscuitMiner
ModMetaData.description:
讓每位殖民者都擁有自己的料理偏好。殖民者吃到喜歡的食物時會獲得心情加成；長時間吃不到偏好食物時，則可能產生負面心情與偏好剝奪狀態。
模組支援多種食物分類、食材判斷、角色卡顯示與可調整設定。
需求： - Harmony
可選相容 (非必需)： - RimHUD - EdB Prepare Carefully
---------------------------
Gives every colonist their own food preference. Colonists gain a mood bonus when they eat food they like; if they go too long without their preferred food, they may suffer negative mood effects and preference deprivation.
The mod supports multiple food categories, ingredient-based detection, character card display, and adjustable settings.
Requirements: - Harmony
Optional Compatibility (not required): - RimHUD - EdB Prepare Carefully
